value.found_quote: You can also control the [web search tool](https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/tools-web-search) without granting full network access to spawned commands. Codex defaults to using a web search cache to access results. ... Use `--search` or set `web_search = "live"` to allow live browsing, or set it to `"disabled"` to turn the tool off
value.name: web search tool (cached, live, or disabled modes)
